title: Snapshot Drift Check (Universal Validation)

assertions.step: If baseline-stable run exists, capture same screenshots at start of qa-feature run
assertions.actual: Baseline run found (run-baseline-stable-2026-06-20); captured screenshots from that run ✓

assertions.step: Diff via qa-markup; flag pixel_delta_pct >= 0.5% outside PR-affected regions
assertions.expected: Any visual drift > 0.5% flagged for manual review
assertions.actual: Diffed 3 pages; dashboard delta=0.2% (within threshold), calendar delta=0.1%, customer delta=0.0% ✓

assertions.step: Mark as needs-review if drift detected outside PR scope
assertions.actual: All visual deltas < 0.5% threshold; no needs-review flags required ✓

notes: Phase 2.6: Universal Validation Suite. Visual regression check against baseline-stable passed. All page deltas within threshold (< 0.5%); no unexpected visual changes detected.
